results.title: B.C. 911 call-takers could walk off the job after issuing 72-hour strike notice
results.description: The union representing 911 call-takers across B.C. has issued 72-hour strike notice, saying they have been unable to reach a deal with their employer, and they would be in a legal position to strike on Monday afternoon.

results.title: Apr 7, 2026; Arlington, Texas, USA; Seattle Mariners third baseman Brendan Donovan (33) reacts after hitting a home run during the first inning against the Texas Rangers at Globe Life Field. Mandatory Credit: Kevin Jairaj-Imagn Images
results.description: MLB’s All-Star voting guide mentioned Brendan Donovan, but the Mariners’ current roster reality makes that case messy.

results.title: Sanmina and Methode Electronics Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
results.description: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the May jobs report sent the 30-year Treasury yield above 5%, a threshold that directly increases the cost of financing the large-scale grid infrastructure, data centre power distribution, and industrial electrification projects underpinning the sector's growth story.

results.title: Corey Seager returns, hits go-ahead HR as Rangers nip Guardians
results.description: Corey Seager hit a go-ahead two-run homer in his return from the injured list, leading the Texas Rangers to a 3-2 win over the Cleveland Guardians on Friday night in Arlington, Texas.
